source: GA4 property 250338585 (last 7d: 2026-07-09..07-15, landingPage + sessionManualAdContent split) + Shopify live pull (net_sales EUR + sessions, last 90d, by country). Significance/verdict block carried from last Monday (2026-07-13); recomputed Mondays only.
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Refreshed daily by Polly (data); pause/promote verdicts on Mondays. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra fields (aggregate_7d, real_sales_90d, built_not_yet_live) preserved for future UI surfaces.
polly_note: DATA-ONLY REFRESH (Thursday 2026-07-16). No pause/promote verdicts today — decision review: Mondays. EN A/B dead even: by page A 1.00% (14 txn / 1397 sess) vs B 1.01% (14 txn / 1386 sess); by ad-content lp_a 0.97% (18 txn) vs lp_b 0.92% (17 txn). Gap inside noise; neither variant near the ~100 conv/variant threshold. Localized IT/FR/DE conv still reads low in GA (attribution artifact) while Shopify shows real EU revenue (IT 143 orders / €10,157 in 90d, still 3rd-largest market). real_sales_90d refreshed via live Shopify pull today. Next verdict + significance recompute: Monday 2026-07-20.

experiments.name: Big Box LP — Headline & Hero (EN)
experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).

experiments.polly_note: DATA-ONLY (Thu). By page this week A 1.00% (14 txn) vs B 1.01% (14 txn); by ad-content lp_a 0.97% (18 txn) vs lp_b 0.92% (17 txn). Still even, still no winner. No verdict today — significance recomputed Monday. Standing recommendation from last Monday holds: ship shared improvements to A & B and launch V3 as a genuinely different challenger.

experiments.name: Localized LP variants (IT / FR / DE)
experiments.hypothesis: Translated A/B variants would convert non-EN paid traffic at rates comparable to EN.

real_sales_90d.note: Refreshed 2026-07-16 via live Shopify pull (orders by shipping_country, revenue = net_sales EUR; conv = sessions_that_completed_checkout / sessions by session_country, 90d). Confirms the near-0% localized LP conv in GA is a MEASUREMENT artifact (lossy LP->checkout attribution), not a funnel failure.

experiments.polly_note: DATA-ONLY (Thu), no verdict. Localized LP conv reads 0-1.3% in GA but Shopify shows IT/DE/FR/AU converting at 1.9-3.9% with real revenue (IT still 3rd-largest market, 143 orders / €10,157 in 90d). HOLD stance carried from last Monday — do not pause. Fix pending: fire the same GA4 property through checkout so LP-level conv becomes true.
